{{Quote|Home of the 'Rancor Ribs'|RIB hutt's slogan|<ref name="Hate Leads to Lollipops">{{Tales|9|Hate Leads to Lollipops}}</ref>}}
'''RIB hutt''' was a dining establishment on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] owned by an unknown [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] during the times of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] known for being the self-proclaimed "Home of the [[Rancor Ribs]]."

==History==
A young [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] crashed into the restaurant after stealing a [[Skimboard/Legends|skimboard]] and slammed himself into the Hutt owner. After recovering, he managed to steal a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] from a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] patron and used it to slow his descent after jumping off the side of the building.

==Behind the scenes==
The name of the restaurant is likely a reference to the real-world [[Wikipedia:Pizza Hut|Pizza Hut]] restaurant chain.

Most of the waitresses were [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]], one of whom wore an outfit resembling [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa's]] slave outfit.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|9|Hate Leads to Lollipops}} {{1st}}
